creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
Will "git: 35a301555bff - main - Increase UFS/FFS maximum link count from
32767 to 65530." become an EN sometimes after its MFC to stable/14? (The
2 weeks end around 2023-Dec-17, as I remember.)

This would be so that 14.0-RELEASE UFS systems could then do "bulk -a"
builds without a UFS file system limitation caused failure-to-complete
correctly.
